title: Rhythm: home-row words
description: No new letters — just smooth, happy home-row words
text: ask ask sad sad lad lad all all fall fall glass flash had has

tips.text: No new letters — keep a happy, steady beat
Slow is fine; smooth is best

tips.target: ask ask sad sad lad lad
all fall glass flash had has

character_tips.anna: No new letters — just enjoy the flow of your words 🌷
character_tips.maxim: Rhythm day. Smooth beats fast. Keep it steady.
character_tips.knopych: GROOVE TIME! 🎵 Keep the beat, no rush!
character_tips.klavochka: Let the words dance, my sunshine 💃
